name: Dr Alexander Mikhalev
bio: Systems thinker with a deep understanding of technology and a methodological approach to innovation. Over 20 years of experience in engineering, academic, and leadership positions. Pioneering the convergence of AI, ethics, systems engineering, and enterprise architecture to solve complex real-world challenges.

education.course: MSc (Engineer) in Information Systems and Computer Science
education.institution: Moscow State Technical University n/a Bauman (MSTU), Russia
